message.content:
@startuml

participant ElementModel
participant CardModel
participant StringCard
participant Publish
participant ElementView
participant DeckView
participant IOTech
participant DeckTechView

[->> ElementModel : encode
activate ElementModel
ElementModel ->> CardModel : encode each CardModel
activate CardModel
create StringCard
CardModel ->> StringCard : create
CardModel -->> ElementModel : return StringCardCollection
deactivate CardModel
deactivate ElementModel

[->> ElementModel : send
activate ElementModel
ElementModel ->> Publish : send StringCardCollection
activate Publish
Publish ->> ElementView : send StringCardCollection
activate ElementView
ElementView ->> ElementView : Store StringCardCollection
ElementView -->> Publish
deactivate ElementView
deactivate Publish
deactivate ElementModel

[->> ElementModel : Show
activate ElementModel
ElementModel ->> ElementView
activate ElementView
ElementView ->> DeckView : GetDeckView
activate DeckView
create DeckTechView
DeckView ->> DeckTechView : create
DeckTechView -->> DeckView
DeckView -->> ElementView : return
deactivate DeckView
ElementView ->> DeckTechView : Show(StringCardCollection)
deactivate ElementView
deactivate ElementModel

@enduml
